title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, a CS Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI from first mathematical principles rather than current tools yields skills more resilient to hype cycles. He advocates learning AI slowly by hand at human speed and positions mathematical foundations as stable learning anchors across evolving technologies.
